ddls:
CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent_id" TEXT /* Continent the region is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the product group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product group */,
  "parent_group_id" TEXT /* Parent group ID for hierarchical grouping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Group that the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) */,
  "ean" TEXT /* European Article Numbering (EAN) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES product_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "continent_id" TEXT /* Continent where the sale occurred */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product ID of the product sold */,
  "year_week" INTEGER /* Year and week of the sales data (format: YYYYWW) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold during the week */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the product during the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the product is stored */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Region where the warehouse is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_warehouse" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
